topic: Nobody is talking about this: Too much self-reflection is linked to anxiety and depression.

script.hook: Nobody is talking about this: Too much self-reflection is linked to anxiety and depression.
script.body: Psychologists have known this for decades but it never makes it into mainstream education. The people who use this have an unfair advantage in every conversation.
script.cta: Follow so you do not miss the rest.

The people who use this have an unfair advantage in every conversation. Follow so you do not miss the rest.
